trap: Template literal string concatenation for classes
description: cn() (twMerge + clsx) for conditional/merged classes

trap: Manual ternary for variant classes
description: cva() for component variants, not manual conditionals

trap: @apply in card.css component styles
description: @apply only for base/typography, not component styles

trap: p-5, mb-7 odd spacing values
description: Spacing scale increments of 4 (4,6,8,12,16,24)

trap: text-[12px], text-[16px] arbitrary pixel values
description: Tailwind size classes (text-sm, text-base) not arbitrary px

trap: bg-${color}-500 dynamic class construction
description: Never concatenate dynamic classes; use full string maps

trap: Hex colors #3b82f6 in config and components
description: OKLCH format for design token colors in @theme

trap: tailwind.config.ts instead of @theme in CSS
description: v4: @theme {} in CSS replaces tailwind.config.ts

trap: @tailwind base/components/utilities directives
description: v4: @import 'tailwindcss' replaces @tailwind directives

trap: node_modules in content array
description: v4: auto content detection, never include node_modules

trap: bg-opacity-50 old syntax
description: v4: bg-black/50 not bg-opacity-50

trap: No focus styles on interactive elements
description: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 on all interactive elements

trap: Small button without min touch target
description: 44x44px minimum touch targets on mobile

trap: MenuButton has icon-only SVG button with no text and no aria-label
description: sr-only for screen-reader text; icon buttons need aria-label

trap: transition-all without motion-reduce variant
description: motion-reduce:transition-none for animations

trap: transition-all animates width/height
description: Only GPU properties (transform, opacity); avoid transition-all

trap: forwardRef pattern in Card component
description: React 19: ref is regular prop, no forwardRef

trap: Dialog as single component, not compound
description: Compound component pattern (Dialog.Trigger, Dialog.Content)

trap: z-999 arbitrary z-index
description: Systematic z-index scale (10,20,40,50)

trap: No dark mode support
description: Dark mode with .dark { --color-*: value } overrides

trap: No responsive variants, fixed width w-[480px]
description: Mobile-first responsive: base=mobile, add sm:/md:/lg:

trap: w-8 h-8 on avatar instead of size-8
description: size-* shorthand when w and h are equal

trap: rgba() for semi-transparent primary-50/primary-10 variants
description: color-mix() in oklab for semi-transparent color variants

trap: @theme defines custom colors without clearing defaults first
description: --color-*: initial to clear defaults before custom palette

trap: animate-pulse used but no --animate-* tokens or @keyframes in @theme
description: Animation tokens: --animate-* and @keyframes defined in @theme

trap: ContainerCard has no @container, children use no @lg: variants
description: Container queries: @container on parent + @lg:/@2xl: on children

trap: truncate in grid cells without min-w-0 causes overflow
description: min-w-0 + truncate in grid cells to prevent overflow

trap: PriceTag has no contrast-more: variant for high-contrast
description: contrast-more: variant for high-contrast support

trap: Skeleton uses bg-gray-300 rounded-sm, not bg-gray-200 rounded-md dark:bg-gray-800
description: Skeleton: animate-pulse + rounded-md bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-800

trap: Native popover has no @starting-style for entry animation
description: @starting-style for native popover/entry animations

trap: @variant dark instead of @custom-variant dark (&:where(.dark, .dark *))
description: v4: @custom-variant dark (&:where(.dark, .dark *)) syntax

trap: body has no bg-background text-foreground; no border-border on *
description: bg-background text-foreground on body, border-border on *

trap: Dropdown built from scratch instead of using Radix primitives
description: Radix primitives for accessible unstyled components
